title: penstemon kingii
intro: Penstemon kingii, also known as the Royal Penstemon or King's Penstemon, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's health benefits are said to include soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Penstemon kingii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
